properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.table-name
properties.description: Physical table name for Outbox records. Defaults to jfoundry_outbox_event.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.dispatcher.mode
properties.description: Dispatch trigger implementation. Defaults to scheduled.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.dispatcher.interval-ms
properties.description: Delay in milliseconds between scheduled-mode dispatch attempts. Defaults to 5000.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.dispatcher.cron
properties.description: Cron expression used by JobRunr mode. Defaults to every ten seconds.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.dispatcher.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of pending messages claimed by one dispatch attempt. Defaults to 50.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.dispatcher.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum delivery attempts before a message is dead-lettered. Defaults to 5.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.dispatcher.backoff-base-ms
properties.description: Initial retry backoff in milliseconds. Defaults to 1000.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.dispatcher.backoff-max-ms
properties.description: Maximum retry backoff in milliseconds. Defaults to 300000.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.recovery.enabled
properties.description: Whether recovery is enabled. When unset, it follows the dispatcher mode.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.recovery.interval
properties.description: Recovery job interval. Defaults to 60 seconds.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.recovery.stuck-timeout
properties.description: How long a DISPATCHING record may remain claimed before it is returned to PENDING. Defaults to five minutes.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.cleanup.enabled
properties.description: Whether cleanup is enabled. When unset, it follows the dispatcher mode.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.cleanup.interval
properties.description: Cleanup job interval. Defaults to 24 hours.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.cleanup.published-retention-days
properties.description: Retention period in days for PUBLISHED records. Defaults to 7.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.cleanup.dead-lettered-retention-days
properties.description: Retention period in days for DEAD_LETTERED records. Defaults to 30.

properties.name: jfoundry.outbox.cleanup.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum records deleted per batch. Defaults to 1000.
